---
agent: Instructions Generator
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate an agent instruction .md file for it in the /docs directory. If a md filename is provided, use that otherwise generate an appropriate filename based on the generated content. Make sure the instructions are consise and not too long. Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file to reference this new docs file. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the neccessary details about the layer of the architecture or coding standards to doccument.
